chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-3713 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on M.A 30/17 3. For hearing of main case 24.01.2019 This petition was filed on 31.12.2016, but since then no one has appeared to pursue this petition. Even today petitioner is absent and no intimation has been received on his behalf. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
